title: Havamal 1-20: The Wisdom of the High One
description: Practical wisdom attributed to Odin: hospitality, caution, the proper way to live among others.
introduction: Practical wisdom attributed to Odin: hospitality, caution, the proper way to live among others.

translation.original_text: Gáttir allar áðr gangi fram um skoðask skyli, um skyggnask skyli, þvíat óvíst er at vita hvar óvinir sitja á fleti fyrir.
translation.text: Before entering a doorway, look around, look about — for you never know where enemies may be sitting within.

translation.original_text: Deyr fé, deyja frændr, deyr sjálfr it sama; en orðstírr deyr aldregi hveim er sér góðan getr.
translation.text: Cattle die, kinsmen die, you yourself will die; but the good name never dies of one who has earned it.
